Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('/tmp/lejerrapport.xlsx'\); console.log\('Sheets:', wb.SheetNames\); wb.SheetNames.forEach\(n => { const ws = wb.Sheets[n]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {header:1}\); console.log\('\\\\n=== ' + n + ' ==='\); data.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\); }\);")
